data.body: Evidence for 'make lint && make typecheck && make test pass on the merged result': all child changes landed on origin/main via Gerrit, each with Verified+1 (CI = build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions): 4001->598/d9ef8e651, 44b7->599, 1d1b->600, 1fdc->601+625, f476->602, a263->603, 5977->604+622, 2da6->605+623, 25aa->606; completion-verifier follow-ups landed as 621-623 and 625. Local full 'make test' passed 5634 tests; make lint + make typecheck clean. All 9 child stories are closed with signed completion attestations, so the epic's open-children guard is satisfied and every valid finding from the coverage-report validation is fixed or scheduled.
